exercises.title: String Methods
exercises.explanation: Use .upper() method to convert to uppercase.

exercises.title: String Slicing
exercises.explanation: Slicing: word[start:end] gets characters from start to end-1.

exercises.title: F-String Formatting
exercises.description: Create f-string: 'Hello, Alice! You are 25 years old'
exercises.solution:
message = f'Hello, {name}! You are {age} years old'
print(message)
exercises.explanation: F-strings use {} to insert variables into strings.

exercises.title: String Find
exercises.explanation: find() returns the index of the first occurrence.
